label: Yandex — Russian Search & Services
domain: yandex.ru, ya.ru, mail.yandex.ru, webmaster.yandex.ru, metrika.yandex.ru, yandex.ru/adv
description: Yandex — Russian search engine and ecosystem. Search, Mail, Webmaster, Metrica (analytics), Direct (ads), Maps. RU locale. Login via Yandex ID (phone/email + password + 2FA possible).
source_patterns: Search: input query in `input[name="text"]` → organic + ads results → click through
Mail: inbox view → read message → compose/reply → send
Webmaster: site verification → sitemap upload → indexing stats → search queries report
Metrica: dashboard → goal reports → session replays → export
Direct: campaign creation → ad groups → keywords → bids → launch
Login: phone/email → password → 2FA if enabled → redirect to service

scroll.description: Search results: short quick passes. Mail/analytics: slower, more deliberate

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate yandex.ru → search query → scroll results (2-3 passes) → click result → read → back to results → login for mail/webmaster/metrica → switch service
